messages.content: What is the weather in SF?

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Lookup the weather for a given city in either celsius or fahrenheit

location.description: The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA
location.title: Location

units.description: Unit for the output, either 'c' for celsius or 'f' for fahrenheit
units.title: Units
